sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32422" key="e)kmageu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκμᾰγεύω</orth>, <sense id="n32422.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bewitch,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1441.tlg001:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Iamb.Bab.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
